test_commands.spec_tests: cd packages/sdk-python && uv run pytest -q tests/
test_commands.linter: cd packages/sdk-python && uv run ruff check .

dependencies.relationship: Python SDK typed models and method signatures must match the OpenAPI schemas defined in spec 03

task_groups.title: Write tests: project structure, Client construction, context manager, auth headers

subtasks.title: Write tests for pyproject.toml configuration and package layout (TS-11-1, TS-11-2, TS-11-3, TS-11-4)
details: In tests/test_client.py (or a separate tests/test_project_structure.py), write TS-11-1: parse pyproject.toml and assert name='apikit', requires-python='>=3.12', httpx>=0.27 in deps, respx/mypy/ruff/pytest in dev deps.
Write TS-11-2: assert all required file paths exist under packages/sdk-python/.
Write TS-11-3: assert `from apikit import Client, APIError, User, Organization` succeeds and all are types.
Write TS-11-4: assert pyproject.toml has no PyPI publishing configuration (no flit/twine/publish url).
All tests must fail initially (red) since source files do not yet exist.

subtasks.title: Write tests for Client constructor, URL normalization, timeout forwarding (TS-11-5, TS-11-6, TS-11-7, TS-11-8)
details: Write TS-11-5: instantiate Client with all parameter combinations and assert defaults (mount_point='/api/v1', timeout=30.0).
Write TS-11-6: assert trailing slashes stripped from base_url and mount_point at construction.
Write TS-11-7: use respx.mock to verify healthz/readyz/version hit base_url directly; get_user hits base_url+mount_point.
Write TS-11-8: verify httpx.Client receives timeout=5.0 and timeout=None respectively.
Write TS-11-E2: assert multiple trailing slashes are all stripped (base_url='https://api.example.com///').
Write TS-11-E3: assert empty string mount_point is stored as '' and URL construction remains correct.

subtasks.title: Write tests for context manager protocol (TS-11-9, TS-11-10, TS-11-E4)
details: Write TS-11-9: verify `with Client(...) as c:` returns self and httpx.Client is closed after the block.
Write TS-11-10: verify exceptions inside the with block propagate; httpx.Client is still closed.
Write TS-11-E4: patch httpx.Client.close to raise RuntimeError; verify it propagates without suppression.
Use `unittest.mock.patch` for TS-11-E4 since no real HTTP call is needed.

subtasks.title: Write tests for authentication, standard headers, and response header capture (TS-11-11 through TS-11-17)
details: Write TS-11-11: with api_key set, verify Authorization: Bearer header on every request.
Write TS-11-12: with api_key=None, verify no Authorization header is sent.
Write TS-11-13: verify Accept: application/json is present on all requests.
Write TS-11-14: verify Content-Type: application/json is present on POST/PATCH requests.
Write TS-11-15: verify last_etag and last_request_id reset and populate from response headers.
Write TS-11-16: verify last_etag is None when response has no ETag header.
Write TS-11-17: verify last_request_id is None when response has no X-Request-ID header.
Use respx.mock for all tests; define SAMPLE_USER_DICT as a module-level fixture dict.

subtasks.title: Write tests for ETag/If-None-Match conditional GET support (TS-11-18, TS-11-19, TS-11-20)
details: Write TS-11-18: verify If-None-Match header is sent when if_none_match is provided.
Write TS-11-19: verify NotModifiedError raised on 304; assert not isinstance(raised, APIError).
Write TS-11-20: verify If-None-Match header absent when if_none_match=None.
Write TS-11-P7 property parametrization: test all conditional GET methods (get_user, get_user_by_id, get_org, get_token) with mocked 304.

checks: All test files under packages/sdk-python/tests/ exist and are syntactically valid Python (importable).
Tests are collected by pytest without import errors: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run pytest --collect-only -q` exits with 0 errors.
All tests in this group fail with ImportError or AttributeError (red phase — implementations not yet written).
No linter errors introduced in test files: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run ruff check tests/`.

task_groups.title: Write tests: exceptions, typed models, from_dict/to_dict

subtasks.title: Write tests for exception hierarchy (TS-11-21 through TS-11-26)
details: Write TS-11-21: assert APIError(code=404, message='not found') has correct attributes and is an Exception.
Write TS-11-22: assert 4xx with valid JSON envelope raises APIError with envelope code/message.
Write TS-11-23: assert 5xx with non-JSON body raises APIError with HTTP status code and raw text.
Write TS-11-24: assert 5xx with empty body raises APIError with code and message='Unexpected error'.
Write TS-11-25: parametrize 401→UnauthorizedError, 403→ForbiddenError, 404→NotFoundError, 409→ConflictError; each is isinstance(e, APIError).
Write TS-11-26: assert issubclass(NotModifiedError, Exception) and not issubclass(NotModifiedError, APIError).
Write TS-11-E5: assert 5xx with JSON body missing code/message sub-fields falls back to APIError with raw text.

subtasks.title: Write tests for response dataclass definitions and field shapes (TS-11-27 through TS-11-32)
details: Write TS-11-27: import all 10 response dataclasses and assert dataclasses.is_dataclass for each.
Write TS-11-28: assert snake_case field names (created_at, key_id, provider_id, token_id) on relevant classes.
Write TS-11-29: assert status on User/Organization and role on User are plain str; arbitrary values accepted.
Write TS-11-30: assert APIKeyWithSecret has exactly {key, key_id, expires_at} fields; created_at/revoked_at absent.
Write TS-11-31: assert AuthCallbackResponse has user: User and api_key: APIKeyWithSecret fields.
Write TS-11-32: assert list_org_members returns list[User]; assert `from apikit import OrgMember` raises ImportError.

subtasks.title: Write tests for from_dict deserialization and edge cases (TS-11-33, TS-11-34, TS-11-E6, TS-11-E7)
details: Write TS-11-33: assert User.from_dict with RFC 3339 strings produces datetime objects for created_at and updated_at.
Write TS-11-34: assert HealthStatus.from_dict with extra unknown keys raises no exception; returns HealthStatus(status='ok').
Write TS-11-E6: assert User.from_dict with malformed datetime string raises ValueError.
Write TS-11-E7: assert User.from_dict with missing required fields raises KeyError or TypeError.
Write TS-11-P4 parametrized test: for each response dataclass, from_dict with extra keys never raises.

subtasks.title: Write tests for to_dict serialization and internal request dataclasses (TS-11-35, TS-11-36, TS-11-37)
details: Write TS-11-35: assert UpdateOrgRequest(name=None, url='https://example.com').to_dict() returns {'url': 'https://example.com'} with no None values.
Write TS-11-36: import all 6 internal request dataclasses from apikit.models; assert each is a dataclass.
Write TS-11-37: assert CreateTokenRequest and AuthCallbackRequest have expires field typed int with default 90.
Write TS-11-P5 parametrized test: to_dict() for all request dataclasses with optional fields=None never yields None values.

checks: All new test functions collected without import errors: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run pytest --collect-only -q`.
Tests in this group fail with ImportError or AttributeError (red phase).
No ruff linter errors in test files: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run ruff check tests/`.
Requirements 11-REQ-8.x, 11-REQ-9.x, 11-REQ-10.x, 11-REQ-11.1, 11-REQ-12.x acceptance criteria are traceable to written tests.

task_groups.title: Write tests: endpoint methods (health/auth/self), status code rules, keyword-only args, tooling gates

subtasks.title: Write tests for health/meta and auth endpoint methods (TS-11-38 through TS-11-40)

subtasks.title: Write tests for HTTP status code rules, keyword-only args, and tooling gates (TS-11-64 through TS-11-71)

checks: All tests collected without errors: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run pytest --collect-only -q` exits 0.
Test group 3 tests fail with ImportError/AttributeError (red phase — implementations pending).
No ruff linter errors in test files: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run ruff check tests/`.
Total test count matches expected number from test_spec (≥71 test functions + property/smoke variants).

task_groups.title: Scaffold project: pyproject.toml, package layout, and stub source files

subtasks.title: Create packages/sdk-python/ directory structure and pyproject.toml
details: Create directory tree: packages/sdk-python/src/apikit/ and packages/sdk-python/tests/.
Write pyproject.toml with [project] name='apikit', version='0.1.0', requires-python='>=3.12', dependencies=['httpx>=0.27'].
Add [project.optional-dependencies] dev=['respx>=0.21','mypy>=1.10','ruff>=0.4','pytest'].
Add [tool.mypy] strict=true and [tool.ruff] sections.
Do NOT include any PyPI publishing configuration (no [project.urls] publish, no flit/twine).
Create empty __init__.py files: src/apikit/__init__.py and tests/__init__.py.

subtasks.title: Create stub exceptions.py with all exception classes
details: Create src/apikit/exceptions.py.
Define APIError(Exception) with __init__(self, code: int, message: str): self.code=code; self.message=message; super().__init__(message).
Define UnauthorizedError(APIError), ForbiddenError(APIError), NotFoundError(APIError), ConflictError(APIError) — all stub subclasses.
Define NotModifiedError(Exception) — direct subclass of Exception, not APIError.
All classes pass mypy strict (full type annotations on __init__).

subtasks.title: Create stub models.py with all dataclass definitions (response and request)
details: Create src/apikit/models.py.

Define all 10 response dataclasses: User, APIKey, APIKeyWithSecret, PAT, PATWithSecret, Organization, OAuthProvider, AuthCallbackResponse, VersionInfo, HealthStatus — each with correct snake_case fields and type annotations per PRD.
APIKeyWithSecret: exactly 3 fields: key: str, key_id: str, expires_at: datetime | None.
status/role fields on User and Organization typed as plain str.
Define all 6 internal request dataclasses: UpdateUserRequest, CreateUserRequest, CreateTokenRequest, CreateOrgRequest, UpdateOrgRequest, AuthCallbackRequest.
CreateTokenRequest.expires and AuthCallbackRequest.expires: int with default=90.
Stub from_dict and to_dict as `raise NotImplementedError` for now — they will be implemented in group 5.

subtasks.title: Create stub client.py with Client class skeleton and __init__.py exports
details: Create src/apikit/client.py.
Define Client class with __init__(self, base_url: str, mount_point: str = '/api/v1', api_key: str | None = None, timeout: float | None = 30.0) -> None.
Store _base_url, _mount_point, _api_key, _timeout, _http_client (httpx.Client), last_etag: str | None = None, last_request_id: str | None = None.
Stub all endpoint methods with `raise NotImplementedError` — signatures must be correct (keyword-only where required).
Implement __enter__/__exit__ stubs.
Update src/apikit/__init__.py to export Client, all response model dataclasses, and all exception types.

checks: Package is importable: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run python -c 'from apikit import Client, APIError, User, Organization'` exits 0.
TS-11-1, TS-11-2, TS-11-3, TS-11-4 now pass: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run pytest tests/ -k 'test_pyproject or test_package_layout or test_imports or test_no_pypi' -q`.
TS-11-27, TS-11-28, TS-11-30, TS-11-31, TS-11-36, TS-11-37 pass (dataclass field shapes).
TS-11-21, TS-11-25, TS-11-26 pass (exception hierarchy).
No ruff errors: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run ruff check .`.
mypy strict passes on stubs: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run mypy src/`.

task_groups.title: Implement from_dict, to_dict, and exception handling logic

subtasks.title: Implement from_dict on all response dataclasses
details: Replace `raise NotImplementedError` stubs in each response dataclass with actual from_dict(data: dict) -> Self classmethod.
Parse RFC 3339 datetime strings using datetime.fromisoformat() or dateutil.parser.isoparse(); raise ValueError on malformed strings.
For nested dataclasses (AuthCallbackResponse.user, AuthCallbackResponse.api_key): call nested .from_dict() on the sub-dict.
Silently ignore all extra/unknown keys: filter data dict to only known field names before constructing instance.
For list fields (PAT.permissions, PATWithSecret.permissions): pass through list directly.
For nullable datetime fields (expires_at, revoked_at): return None when value is None, parse when non-None.
Use typing.Self (Python 3.11+) or cls(...) pattern compatible with Python 3.12.

subtasks.title: Implement to_dict on all internal request dataclasses
details: Replace `raise NotImplementedError` stubs in each request dataclass with actual to_dict() -> dict method.
Omit any field whose value is None (do not include key at all in output dict).
Include required (non-None) fields always.
No datetime serialization needed in request dataclasses (all fields are str, int, list[str], or str|None).
Verify UpdateOrgRequest(name=None, url='x').to_dict() == {'url': 'x'}.
All 6 internal request dataclasses: UpdateUserRequest, CreateUserRequest, CreateTokenRequest, CreateOrgRequest, UpdateOrgRequest, AuthCallbackRequest.

subtasks.title: Implement _raise_for_status error parsing in Client
details: Add a private _raise_for_status(self, response: httpx.Response) -> None method to Client.
Try to parse JSON body; look for {'error': {'code': N, 'message': '...'}} envelope.
If envelope parsed successfully: use envelope code and message; else use HTTP status code and raw response.text.
If body is empty (response.text.strip() == ''): use 'Unexpected error' as message.
If JSON parses but lacks expected nested structure (11-REQ-8.E1): fall back to raw response text — wrap in try/except KeyError.
Map status codes to subclasses: 401→UnauthorizedError, 403→ForbiddenError, 404→NotFoundError, 409→ConflictError, all others→APIError.
Also handle 304: raise NotModifiedError() (not an error, separate branch).

checks: TS-11-33, TS-11-34, TS-11-E6, TS-11-E7 pass: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run pytest tests/test_models.py -q`.
TS-11-35, TS-11-P5 pass: to_dict tests green.
TS-11-21 through TS-11-26, TS-11-E5 pass: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run pytest tests/test_exceptions.py -q`.
No ruff errors: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run ruff check .`.
No mypy errors: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run mypy src/`.
11-REQ-10.1, 11-REQ-10.2 acceptance criteria met (from_dict parses datetimes and ignores unknown keys).
11-REQ-11.1 acceptance criteria met (to_dict omits None optional fields).

task_groups.title: Implement Client core: construction, URL building, headers, context manager, ETag

subtasks.title: Implement Client __init__ with URL normalization and httpx.Client setup
details: In __init__: store self._base_url = base_url.rstrip('/'), self._mount_point = mount_point.rstrip('/').
Initialize self._http_client = httpx.Client(timeout=timeout).
Initialize self.last_etag: str | None = None and self.last_request_id: str | None = None.
Store self._api_key = api_key.
The rstrip('/') approach handles 0-N trailing slashes uniformly (handles 11-REQ-2.E1).
Empty string mount_point: rstrip('/') on '' returns '' — store as '' (handles 11-REQ-2.E2).

subtasks.title: Implement Client context manager (__enter__ and __exit__)
details: Implement __enter__(self) -> 'Client': return self.
Implement __exit__(self, exc_type, exc_val, exc_tb) -> None: call self._http_client.close(); return None (never suppress).
Closing httpx.Client via .close() is unconditional — even if exc_type is not None.
Return type is None (falsy) so any exception propagates.
If close() itself raises, that exception propagates naturally (11-REQ-3.E1 — no suppression).

subtasks.title: Implement _build_url, _get_headers, and _request helper methods
details: Implement _build_url(self, path: str, use_mount: bool = True) -> str: if use_mount: return self._base_url + self._mount_point + path; else return self._base_url + path.

Implement _get_headers(self, with_body: bool = False, if_none_match: str | None = None) -> dict[str, str]: always include Accept: application/json; add Authorization: Bearer when api_key not None; add Content-Type: application/json when with_body=True; add If-None-Match when if_none_match not None.

Implement _request(self, method, url, *, json=None, params=None, if_none_match=None) -> httpx.Response: reset last_etag=None and last_request_id=None; build headers; send request via self._http_client.request(); capture ETag and X-Request-ID from response headers; call _raise_for_status for non-2xx non-204 non-304; return response.
Health/meta URLs use use_mount=False; all others use use_mount=True (default).

subtasks.title: Write property-based URL double-slash tests and verify Client core tests pass
details: Run TS-11-5, TS-11-6, TS-11-7, TS-11-8, TS-11-9, TS-11-10 to confirm Client core is wired.
Run TS-11-11 through TS-11-20 to confirm auth headers and ETag behavior.
Run TS-11-P1: parametrize base_url and mount_point with trailing slashes; assert no double slashes in constructed URLs.
Run TS-11-P2: for multiple mount_point values, health/version URLs don't contain mount_point.
Run TS-11-P3: verify last_etag/last_request_id are always None at start of each request.

checks: TS-11-5, TS-11-6, TS-11-7, TS-11-8, TS-11-E2, TS-11-E3 pass: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run pytest tests/test_client.py -k 'constructor or url or timeout' -q`.
TS-11-9, TS-11-10, TS-11-E4 pass: context manager tests green.
TS-11-11 through TS-11-20 pass: header and ETag tests green.
TS-11-P1, TS-11-P2, TS-11-P3 pass: property invariant tests green.
No ruff errors: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run ruff check .`.
No mypy errors: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run mypy src/`.
11-REQ-2.x, 11-REQ-3.x, 11-REQ-4.x, 11-REQ-5.x, 11-REQ-6.x, 11-REQ-7.x acceptance criteria met.

task_groups.title: Implement health/meta, auth, and authenticated-user (self) endpoint methods

subtasks.title: Implement health/meta endpoint methods: healthz, readyz, version
details: Implement healthz(self) -> HealthStatus: call _request('GET', _build_url('/healthz', use_mount=False)); return HealthStatus.from_dict(response.json()).
Implement readyz(self) -> HealthStatus: identical pattern with '/readyz'.
Implement version(self) -> VersionInfo: identical pattern with '/version'; return VersionInfo.from_dict(response.json()).
All three must use use_mount=False to resolve against base_url only.

subtasks.title: Implement auth endpoint methods: get_providers, exchange_oauth_code
details: Implement get_providers(self) -> list[OAuthProvider]: GET /auth/providers; return [OAuthProvider.from_dict(p) for p in response.json()].

Implement exchange_oauth_code(self, *, provider: str, code: str, redirect_uri: str, expires: int = 90) -> AuthCallbackResponse: build AuthCallbackRequest; send POST /auth/callback with json=body.to_dict(); return AuthCallbackResponse.from_dict(response.json()).
exchange_oauth_code must use keyword-only arguments (the * enforces this).

subtasks.title: Implement authenticated-user key and token methods
details: Implement get_user(*, if_none_match=None) -> User: GET /user with if_none_match; return User.from_dict(response.json()).
Implement update_user(*, full_name: str) -> User: PATCH /user with json={'full_name': full_name}; return User.from_dict(response.json()).
Implement list_keys() -> list[APIKey]: GET /user/keys; return [APIKey.from_dict(k) for k in response.json()].
Implement refresh_key(key_id: str) -> APIKeyWithSecret: POST /user/keys/{key_id}/refresh (no body); parse HTTP 200 as APIKeyWithSecret.from_dict(response.json()).
Implement revoke_key(key_id: str) -> None: DELETE /user/keys/{key_id}; return None (204).

Implement list_tokens(), create_token(*, name, permissions, expires=90) -> PATWithSecret, get_token(token_id, *, if_none_match=None) -> PAT, revoke_token(token_id) -> None, list_user_orgs() -> list[Organization].
All keyword-only parameters use * in signature.

checks: TS-11-38 passes: health/meta methods return correct typed objects and use base_url directly.
TS-11-39, TS-11-40 pass: auth methods send correct requests and deserialize responses.
TS-11-41 through TS-11-50 pass: all authenticated-user methods green.
TS-11-44 specifically passes: refresh_key parses HTTP 200 as APIKeyWithSecret.
No ruff errors: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run ruff check .`.
No mypy errors: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run mypy src/`.

task_groups.title: Implement admin user management and organization endpoint methods

subtasks.title: Implement admin user CRUD and status-change methods
details: Implement list_users(*, include_blocked: bool = False) -> list[User]: GET /users; append params={'include_blocked': 'true'} when include_blocked=True (only when True).
Implement get_user_by_id(user_id: str, *, if_none_match=None) -> User: GET /users/{user_id}.
Implement create_user(*, username, email, provider, provider_id) -> User: POST /users with CreateUserRequest.to_dict(); return User on 201.
Implement update_user_by_id(user_id: str, *, full_name: str) -> User: PATCH /users/{user_id} with UpdateUserRequest.to_dict().
Implement promote_user, demote_user, block_user, unblock_user — each POST to /users/{user_id}/{action}; return User.from_dict(response.json()).

subtasks.title: Implement admin user key and token management methods
details: Implement list_user_keys(user_id: str) -> list[APIKey]: GET /users/{user_id}/keys.
Implement revoke_user_key(user_id: str, key_id: str) -> None: DELETE /users/{user_id}/keys/{key_id}; return None on 204.
Implement list_user_tokens(user_id: str) -> list[PAT]: GET /users/{user_id}/tokens.
Implement revoke_user_token(user_id: str, token_id: str) -> None: DELETE /users/{user_id}/tokens/{token_id}; return None on 204.

subtasks.title: Implement organization CRUD, block/unblock, and member management methods
details: Implement create_org(*, name, slug, url=None) -> Organization: POST /orgs with CreateOrgRequest.to_dict(); return Organization on 201.
Implement list_orgs(*, include_blocked=False) -> list[Organization]: GET /orgs; append include_blocked=true param when True.
Implement get_org(org_id, *, if_none_match=None) -> Organization: GET /orgs/{org_id}.
Implement update_org(org_id, *, name=None, url=None) -> Organization: PATCH /orgs/{org_id} with UpdateOrgRequest(name, url).to_dict().
Implement delete_org(org_id) -> None: DELETE /orgs/{org_id}; return None on 204.
Implement block_org, unblock_org: POST to /orgs/{org_id}/block and /unblock; return Organization.from_dict(response.json()).
Implement list_org_members(org_id) -> list[User]: GET /orgs/{org_id}/members; return [User.from_dict(m) for m in response.json()].
Implement add_org_member(org_id, user_id) -> None: PUT /orgs/{org_id}/members/{user_id}; return None on 204.
Implement remove_org_member(org_id, user_id) -> None: DELETE /orgs/{org_id}/members/{user_id}; return None on 204.

subtasks.title: Verify HTTP status code rules and keyword-only arg enforcement
details: Confirm _request helper handles 200/201 by returning response for body parsing; 204 by returning None; 304 by raising NotModifiedError.
Ensure methods that return None on 204 (DELETE/PUT) do not attempt JSON parsing.
Confirm refresh_key is wired to parse 200 (not 201) as APIKeyWithSecret.
Confirm all body-accepting methods use * in signature; run TS-11-67 to confirm TypeError on positional arg.
Run TS-11-P6 property test: 401/403/404/409 each raise correct subclass and isinstance(e, APIError) is True.

checks: TS-11-51 through TS-11-57 pass: admin user management tests green.
TS-11-58 through TS-11-63 pass: organization management tests green.
TS-11-64 through TS-11-67 pass: status code rules and keyword-only enforcement verified.
TS-11-P6 passes: all status-code-specific exception subclasses are also APIError instances.
No ruff errors: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run ruff check .`.
No mypy errors: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run mypy src/`.
All 11-REQ-16.x and 11-REQ-17.x acceptance criteria met.

task_groups.title: Full test suite green and tooling quality gates pass

subtasks.title: Run complete test suite and confirm all tests pass
details: Run `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run pytest -q` and confirm exit code 0.
Triage and fix any remaining failures — common issues: datetime parsing edge cases, missing URL path segments, incorrect status code branching.
Ensure SAMPLE_USER_DICT, SAMPLE_API_KEY_DICT, SAMPLE_PAT_DICT, SAMPLE_ORG_DICT, SAMPLE_API_KEY_WITH_SECRET_DICT fixtures are defined in a conftest.py or shared module under tests/.

subtasks.title: Run ruff linter and fix all warnings
details: Run `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run ruff check .`; fix all reported issues.
Common issues: unused imports, missing blank lines, line length, f-string usage.
Re-run until exit code 0 with no diagnostics.

subtasks.title: Run mypy strict and fix all type errors
details: Run `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run mypy .`; fix all strict-mode errors.
Common issues: missing return type annotations, untyped parameters in from_dict/to_dict, incorrect use of Self type, missing overloads.
Ensure [tool.mypy] strict=true is set in pyproject.toml and that mypy is run from the packages/sdk-python directory.
Re-run until exit code 0 with 'Success: no issues found'.

subtasks.title: Verify test coverage of all documented scenarios (TS-11-71)
details: Audit tests/ against the 16 documented scenario categories from TS-11-71.

Confirm at least one pytest function exists for each category: URL construction, trailing slash normalization, auth header presence/absence, Content-Type/Accept headers, request body serialization, response deserialization with datetime parsing, from_dict unknown field ignoring, APIError on 4xx/5xx with valid envelope, APIError on non-JSON body, APIError on empty body, subclass exceptions (401/403/404/409), NotModifiedError on 304, last_etag and last_request_id, context manager protocol, timeout forwarding, refresh_key 200-response parsing.
Add any missing test cases identified in the audit.

checks: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run pytest -q` exits 0 with all tests passing.
`cd packages/sdk-python && uv run ruff check .` exits 0 with no errors.
`cd packages/sdk-python && uv run mypy .` exits 0 with no errors in strict mode.
All 16 test scenario categories from TS-11-71 have at least one passing test.
All smoke tests (TS-11-SMOKE-1 through TS-11-SMOKE-6) pass.
11-REQ-20.1 through 11-REQ-20.4 acceptance criteria fully met.

task_groups.title: Wiring verification: end-to-end integration and stub audit

subtasks.title: Trace all execution paths and verify no stubs remain
details: Search for `raise NotImplementedError` and `pass` (as stub bodies in non-abstract methods) in all src/apikit/*.py files — none should remain.
Trace PATH-1 (authenticated GET with ETag): Client.__init__ → _build_url → _request → ETag capture → User.from_dict → return.
Trace PATH-2 (error response): _request → _raise_for_status → JSON parse → NotFoundError raised.
Trace PATH-3 (304 conditional GET): _request → _raise_for_status → NotModifiedError raised.
Trace PATH-4 (context manager): __enter__ → method call → exception → __exit__ → httpx.Client.close().
Trace PATH-5 (OAuth exchange): exchange_oauth_code → AuthCallbackRequest.to_dict → _request → AuthCallbackResponse.from_dict → nested User.from_dict + APIKeyWithSecret.from_dict.
Trace PATH-6 (health probe): healthz → _build_url(use_mount=False) → base_url+/healthz → HealthStatus.from_dict.

subtasks.title: Verify return value propagation across all method chains
details: Confirm all methods that return typed dataclasses call .from_dict(response.json()) and return the result (not None).
Confirm all DELETE/PUT methods returning None on 204 do not call .json() on the response.
Confirm refresh_key receives HTTP 200 and calls APIKeyWithSecret.from_dict(response.json()) — not create flow.
Confirm create_org, create_user, create_token return parsed objects from 201 response bodies.
Confirm list_* methods iterate the JSON array and call from_dict on each element.
Verify by inspecting client.py that no endpoint method returns a bare httpx.Response object to the caller.

subtasks.title: Run all smoke tests with real component wiring
details: Run all smoke tests explicitly: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run pytest tests/ -k 'smoke' -v`.
TS-11-SMOKE-1: Client with trailing-slash URL, GET /user 200, ETag captured, User returned.
TS-11-SMOKE-2: get_user_by_id non-existent, 404 with envelope, NotFoundError raised with code=404.
TS-11-SMOKE-3: get_org with if_none_match, 304 response, NotModifiedError raised, not APIError.
TS-11-SMOKE-4: context manager with ValueError inside; httpx.Client closed; exception propagates.
TS-11-SMOKE-5: exchange_oauth_code with all params; POST body correct; AuthCallbackResponse.user and .api_key populated.
TS-11-SMOKE-6: Client with trailing slashes; healthz() hits exactly 'https://api.example.com/healthz'; no double slashes.

subtasks.title: Dead-code and stub audit: search for Python stub markers
details: Search src/ for `raise NotImplementedError` — zero occurrences expected.
Search src/ for methods containing only `pass` as body — zero occurrences expected (excluding abstract base classes, which are not used here).
Search src/ for `# TODO` comments — resolve or document any found.
Search src/ for `return None` in methods whose return type is not None — investigate each occurrence.
Confirm all 34 endpoint methods in client.py are implemented (not stubbed): count method definitions and cross-check against PRD endpoint table.
Run `grep -rn 'NotImplementedError\|# TODO' packages/sdk-python/src/` and assert no output.

subtasks.title: Cross-spec OpenAPI alignment verification
details: Cross-check all dataclass field names against api/openapi.yaml schema definitions from spec 03.
Verify User fields (id, username, email, full_name, status, role, provider, provider_id, created_at, updated_at) match OpenAPI User schema.
Verify APIKey fields (key_id, created_at, expires_at, revoked_at) match OpenAPI APIKey schema.
Verify APIKeyWithSecret contains only (key, key_id, expires_at) — no created_at or revoked_at.
Verify PAT fields (token_id, name, permissions, created_at, expires_at, revoked_at) match OpenAPI PAT schema.
Verify Organization fields (id, name, slug, url, status, created_at, updated_at) match OpenAPI Organization schema.
Run final full suite: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run pytest -q && uv run ruff check . && uv run mypy .` — all three must exit 0.

checks: `cd packages/sdk-python && uv run pytest -q` exits 0 — all tests pass with no failures or errors.
`cd packages/sdk-python && uv run ruff check .` exits 0 — no linter diagnostics.
`cd packages/sdk-python && uv run mypy .` exits 0 — no strict-mode type errors.
All 6 smoke tests (TS-11-SMOKE-1 through TS-11-SMOKE-6) pass explicitly.
`grep -rn 'raise NotImplementedError' packages/sdk-python/src/` returns no output.
All 34 endpoint methods are present and implemented in client.py (verified by grep/ast inspection).
All dataclass field names match OpenAPI schema shapes from spec 03.
11-REQ-1.x through 11-REQ-20.x acceptance criteria are all met as confirmed by passing tests.
